'''Milo Strander''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[GeNode]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] who served [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]. During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]], he was a [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] in [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Janzor]]'s [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] and was friends with [[Wayson Dower]]. Strander was a [[Soldier/Legends|foot soldier]] in the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|Imperial occupation of Kashyyyk]], where he and Dower were the only members of their 200-man unit to survive. For surviving the mission, he was promoted to [[Sergeant/Legends|first sergeant]] and did not serve in the rest of the campaign.<ref name="Pax Empirica" />

Strander had thick [[Color/Legends|blonde]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], deep blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and a muscular build. At the time of the occupation of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], his generation of clones made up forty percent of the Empire's stormtroopers.<ref name="Pax Empirica" />
